pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm C. It’s a bit nerve-wracking just waiting around for things to start, isn't it? What brings you to a game like this?
Hey C, I'm D. Yeah, the waiting is the worst part. I'm honestly just here for the prize money; I've got people at home I need to look out for. What about you?
I'm in the exact same boat, honestly. I've got people back home I'm trying to help out too, so I'm pretty determined to win this.
I hear you, it's a lot of pressure when others are counting on you. Have you heard anything about how the game actually works?
Not really, I'm just as much in the dark as you are, though I'm hoping it's something we can handle.
I hope so too. Whatever it ends up being, I'm just ready to get started and give it my best shot.
I’m with you on that. Good luck to both of us—it’s good to know someone else here has their head in the game for the same reasons.
Agreed. It’s a lot easier to stay focused when you know why you’re here. Let’s do this.
Exactly. Good luck out there, D—let's hope we both come out on top.
Thanks, C. I appreciate that. Let's see what happens.
For sure. I'll see you when the game starts—best of luck to you.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
I'm glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It's great that everyone walked away with the same amount!
I agree, it was a pleasure working together to ensure a fair outcome for everyone.
